titles.title: There Is No One Like Our God

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He stretches the heavens, Like curtains before Him, He forms every star, And He calls them by name, He does not grow weary, His strength knows no end, The greatness of our God, None can comprehend, Who is like unto our God? Who is like unto our God?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's no one before Him, No one beside Him, There is no other, no, no one like Him, There is no power more great, No one worthy of praise, Like our God, our God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His voice is like thunder, His Word is forever, His love is unfailing, and flows like a river, Worthy of glory and honor and power, And praise is our God, There is no one like our God, No, There is no one like our God.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I walk thru' the fire and He is beside me, I pass thru' the water and I do not fear, The Lord is my keeper, My strength and my song, Mighty in battle, He fights for His own, Who is like unto our God? Who is like unto our God?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: And the earth is filled with His glory, 'The heavens resound with His praise, All of creation declaring that, There is none like Him, No one like Him. :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Who is like unto our God? Who is like unto our God? Who is like unto our God? Who is like unto our God?
